addressedFeedback.finding: Initial no-output completion recorded the step as completed but left a root workflow session running.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Added explicit root no-output completion handling and regression coverage for command nodes with empty output.

lastPlanningNode: manual design-plan-impl-review continuation after prior workflow stall
residualRisks: Container execution is verified with deterministic fake runner argument coverage; live docker/podman availability remains environment-dependent.
Container stdin delivery is verified through deterministic runner argument coverage and a command-node CLI smoke; live docker/podman execution remains environment-dependent.
Default swift lookup may still require explicit DEVELOPER_DIR and SDKROOT override.
verificationCommands: DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer SDKROOT=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/swift run riela workflow run stdio-smoke --workflow-definition-dir /tmp/riela-stdio-node-smoke.* --variables '{"name":"riela"}' --output json

DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer SDKROOT=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/swift run riela workflow run stdio-invalid --workflow-definition-dir /tmp/riela-stdio-node-invalid.* --output json; test $? -ne 0
